raw_output_payload.reasoning: Need to check if path exists and is on a mounted filesystem. Use findmnt -n -o SOURCE /workspace/dir2/mysql/ to see mount point. Or test -d and then findmnt -n -o TARGET. Probably: findmnt -n -o TARGET --target /workspace/dir2/mysql/ && echo exists. But need to determine if exists on a mounted fs. So: if [ -d /workspace/dir2/mysql/ ] && findmnt -n -o TARGET --target /workspace/dir2/mysql/; then echo yes. Provide single command: findmnt -n -o TARGET --target /workspace/dir2/mysql/ && echo "exists".
